mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.username AS userName FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY CASE o.order_status WHEN 0 THEN 1 WHEN 1 THEN 2 WHEN 2 THEN 3 WHEN 4 THEN 5 ELSE 6 END ASC, STR_TO_DATE(o.start_time,'%Y-%m-%d') ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info( order_id, room_id, room_name, room_img, start_time, end_time, room_count, people_count, contact_phone, total_price, pay_method, pay_status, order_status, create_time, user_id, user_name ) VALUES( #{orderId}, #{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{roomImg}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{roomCount}, #{peopleCount}, #{contactPhone}, #{totalPrice}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{orderStatus}, #{createTime}, #{userId}, #{userName} )
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET order_status=3 WHERE order_id=#{orderId}
mapper.select: select count(id) from order_info where DATE(create_time)=CURDATE()
select IFNULL(SUM(total_price),0) from order_info where DATE(create_time)=CURDATE() and pay_status=1
select count(DISTINCT room_id) from order_info where order_status=1
select count(DISTINCT room_id) from order_info where order_status=0
select count(DISTINCT room_id) from order_info where order_status=2
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(room_id) FROM room) - (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_id) FROM order_info WHERE order_status IN (0,1))

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 6- t DAY),'%m-%d') FROM (SELECT 0 t UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) tmp

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(o.id),0) cnt FROM (SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 6- t DAY) d FROM (SELECT 0 t UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) tmp) d LEFT JOIN order_info o ON DATE(o.create_time)=d GROUP BY d ORDER BY d

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(o.total_price),0) money FROM (SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 6- t DAY) d FROM (SELECT 0 t UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) tmp) d LEFT JOIN order_info o ON DATE(o.create_time)=d AND o.pay_status=1 GROUP BY d ORDER BY d

SELECT ROUND(IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_id) FROM order_info WHERE DATE(create_time)=d AND order_status=1),0) /(SELECT COUNT(room_id) FROM room)*100,1) rate FROM (SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 6- t DAY) d FROM (SELECT 0 t UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) tmp) d ORDER BY d
select * from order_info where order_status = 0 order by create_time desc limit 5
select * from order_info where order_status = 1 order by create_time desc limit 5
select * from order_info where order_status = 2 order by create_time desc limit 5

SELECT * FROM order_info
order_status = 0 AND pay_status = 1
order_status = 0 AND pay_status = 1
order_status = 1
order_status = 2
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(id) FROM order_info
order_status = 0 AND pay_status = 1
order_status = 0 AND pay_status = 1
order_status = 1
order_status = 2
